title: Plan view vs. Profile view toggle in the 2D panel
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout is open. The 2D panel is showing Profile view (elevation/side view) of a road cross-section — a trapezoid or curved surface shape should be visible. The Profile button in the Plan/Profile toggle at the top of the 2D panel is highlighted/active. Use Queens Campus road section data.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, 2D panel in Profile view showing road cross-section by elevation

annotations.label: Profile view — elevation cross-section (Z vs. distance along line)
Horizontal axis: distance along the slab center line
